{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Advocate space
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] is currently in [[Advocate space]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The crew does not have a reason to stay in [[Advocate space]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
